MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-02-2021 IN 206, DEFENDANT RICHARD COOPER'S MOTION TO CONTINUE 2/14/22 TRIAL AND ALL RELATED DATES. ROSS PSYHOGIOS, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. PATRICIA RICH, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT RICHARD COPPER VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/14/22 IS CONTINUED TO 6/13/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES INCLUDING DISCOVERY, EXPERT DISCLOSURES, AND MOTION PRACTICE SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION WHICH IS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE (VIA E-FILING) FOR THE CONTINUANCE WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT DEFENDANT WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO GET THE 6/13/22 TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT AND PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SERVE TO MOVING PARTY. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
